projects.name: CPU Ray Tracing Engine in C++
projects.description: A physics based ray tracing engine in C++ to simulate photorealistic rendered scenes

projects.name: Landing Location Identification for Mars Rover using Classical Computer Vision
projects.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline to identify safe landing zones on Mars under computational constraints. Now used as a foundational algorithm at ISRO.

projects.name: Real-time Carbon Credits Market Analysis using Agentic AI
projects.description: Engineered a full-stack platform using Next.js and WebSocket APIs to surface real-time carbon credit pricing, trends, and AI-generated investment signals to end users. Built at Inter-IIT Tech Meet 14.0 as Team 58

projects.name: TermFolio
projects.description: This very website. A terminal-inspired developer portfolio with macOS-style UI, theme switching, and command-based navigation.
